strategy: Hit Fire or Death. He takes +35% from both and resists 80% Life, so never attack into Life. He is stunable if you need a setup round.
Plan around his Weakness cycle: he weakens the whole team at the start of round 1 and again every third round.
Carry Cleanse Charm to strip the Weakness before you swing, or time your big hit on the rounds between the weakness casts.
Nothing here punishes blades, traps, or Feints, so set up normally - stack Fire or Death blades and a Feint on your hitter.
Clear the Brume Goblin minion, cleanse the team Weakness, then land one big Fire or Death hit through his 10,200 health.
cheatNotes: He places a Weakness on the whole team at the start of round 1 and repeats it every third round. Cleanse Charm it or hit on the rounds between so your damage lands full.
